title: Fix test_log_completed_trial_skip_storage_access
body: This PR fixes a test isolation issue where test_log_completed_trial_skip_storage_access depended on the side effects of previously executed tests. The change resets the logger and sets a deterministic logging level to ensure the test runs independently of previous tests.

step_plan.summary: Expose a public API to reset Optuna's library root logger for test isolation and provide a backward-compatible alias. This enables deterministic logging in tests like test_log_completed_trial_skip_storage_access while keeping internal APIs encapsulated.

steps.reason: Introduce a stable, public API to reset Optuna's library root logger to a clean state for test isolation. This wrapper should call the existing internal _reset_library_root_logger() to avoid leaking internal utilities and provide a deterministic logging state for tests such as test_log_completed_trial_skip_storage_access.
steps.side_effects: Enables tests to deterministically reset logging without depending on internal utilities. Minimal impact on production usage. May require updating import paths in tests or documentation to reference the new public API. Potentially updates __all__ to expose the new function.

steps.operation: Add backward-compatible alias reset_logging as a wrapper to reset_library_root_logger
steps.reason: Maintain backward compatibility for code that calls reset_logging by routing it to the new public API reset_library_root_logger. This ensures existing tests or external users using the older API continue to work.
steps.side_effects: No behavioral change for callers; ensures future compatibility. The alias points to the new implementation, so maintenance will be centralized in one function.
